items.title: Iran Escalation Shock Triggers Risk-Off Move To USD And Gold, Oil, Defense And Aerospace Win
items.description: Iran conflict escalations are driving risk-off moves in stocks, crypto, oil, airlines, and defense.

items.title: Iran live updates: U.S. and Israel launch strikes, Trump dubs attack 'Operation Epic Fury'
items.description: President Trump said in a video the U.S. and Israel launched "major combat operations" attacking Iran. Iran retaliated with strikes across the Middle East.

items.title: ​The Boeing Company (BA) Builds Momentum with Wide-Body and 737 MAX Orders from Vietnam
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the best manufacturing stocks to invest in now. On February 19, The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) inked deals to sell almost 100 jets to Vietnamese carriers. The $30 billion worth of deals underscores the growing ties between the Asian nation and the US. The US aircraft manufacturer is to […]

items.title: Airspace closure halts many Middle East flights after attacks
items.description: Airlines canceled 868 flights into Middle East countries on Saturday, according to aviation data firm Cirium.

items.title: Explosions heard across the Middle East as Iran retaliates against U.S. attacks; flights disrupted
items.description: CNBC's team in the United Arab Emirates confirmed hearing a number of loud explosions in both the UAE's capital city of Abu Dhabi and Dubai.
